compressed_context:
CTX: GAME=10 PLAYERS ∧ ROUNDS=20  
RULE1: PER-ROUND DECISION=GO/ STAY  
RULE2: GO ∧ GOERS≤60% → UTILITY(go)=10  
RULE3: GO ∧ GOERS>60% → UTILITY(go)=0  
RULE4: STAY → UTILITY(stay)=5  
CTX: ROUNDS1–12 RECORDS=(GO,STAY)×6 → UTILITY=(0,5,10,5,10,5,10,5,0,5,0,5)  
CTX: ROUNDS13–20 RECORDS=GO×8 → UTILITY=10×8
